programmes.show_description: Action thriller with Sylvester Stallone. A hitman and a police detective become unlikely partners when they join forces to seek revenge on the man who murdered both their partners.
Classic Hammer horror starring Christopher Lee. Two couples touring Eastern Europe ignore the dire warnings of locals and visit the castle home of the sinister Count Dracula.
Horror Channel returns soon.

Two Pit Bull Mastiffs allegedly drag their owner across the street in order to viciously attack another dog.
A generous boss loans his employees over $3,000 so they won't lose their home; when they fail to pay him back, he's forced to sue them.
A woman is accused of making outrageous statements to authorities when she tries to regain access to her illegally sublet apartment.
A woman is forced to evict her brother in order to sell her deceased father's home; he takes issue with the lawyer he hired to help him.
A boy's pet turtle, calls to the police and a controversial electric bill come into play when ex-fiancée's call it quits.
After children deny involvement in vandalising a neighbour's car, Judge Judy imparts an invaluable lesson.
A woman accused of stealing thousands from her cousin tries to clear her name by passing a polygraph test.
A home-based Internet business, a divorce, and an ex-employee caught in the middle come into play when ex-roommates fight over rent.
Claiming she made over $7,000 in car payments, a young woman sues her ex-stepfather after he repossesses her vehicle.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
In 1994, Jason Mitchell strangled pensioners Arthur and Shirley Wilson, before returning to his father's house and dismembering his body.
Roger and Josie Hartland found themselves stalked by their new home's previous owner, a former resident of a Nazi breeding camp.
US model Kelsey Turner's 'Sugar Daddy' scheme turns deadly when she and boyfriend, Jon, murder Dr Burchard after financial betrayal and false accusations.
In the US, Ali Abulaban, a former airman, abused Ana, then killed her and her friend after she left him. He was convicted of two counts of first-degree murder.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
A man mocked by his younger wife begs his scientist brother to give him an experimental youth serum - but the potion goes beyond its intended effect.
A retired watchmaker believes that his days are numbered when his beloved grandfather clock begins to wind down.
Thriller with Sylvester Stallone. A bereaved and alcoholic FBI agent in rehab discovers that a killer is targeting the patients - forcing him to pull himself together to prevent more deaths.
Action sequel, directed by and starring Sylvester Stallone. The bandana-wearing one-man army travels to Burma to rescue a party of missionaries from a sadistic military officer.
Medieval action adventure with Clive Owen. In an age of honour and justice by the sword, a disgraced warrior seeks redemption by leading a band of soldiers to avenge his master's death.
Western psychological thriller. A troubled Confederate soldier returns home to discover a neighbour has been stealing from his family and intervenes, sparking another tragic and senseless war.

A man's love/hate relationship with his 16-year-old motorcycle ends with a heated lawsuit over allegedly shoddy repairs that left him stranded.
Sisters accuse their mother of abuse after she sues them for allegedly destroying their bedrooms; new boyfriends allegedly break the family apart.
The Judge orders a woman to sign over a vehicle to her ex-boyfriend after she sues him for a loan and childcare bills for their 8-year-old.
A man says his neighbour snuck up like a quiet rat busted his eardrum and beat him to the ground; they continue their years long feud in court.
Alleged physical abuse of an autistic minor, $15,000 in back child support and a DNA test to prove paternity come into play when a woman sues her ex-boyfriend's fiancé.
Elementary school teachers fight in front of their students then sue each other over 52 dollars worth of missing textbooks and alleged slander.
After an unpleasant break-up, a malicious e-mail is allegedly sent to a woman's entire company when she insists that her ex-boyfriend pay her back for a loan to fix his car.
A teenager confesses that she stole money from her mother to give to her 16-year-old boyfriend; the boy's mother admits to being complicit in accepting part of the $2,400 received.
A woman hires her housekeeper to clean her entire house in exchange for furniture in her storage unit, but claims she took the wrong items.

When a hooded man shows up, Pamela Lawson thought he was her boyfriend's friend. But, the shadowed figure was her co-worker who had come to kill the man she alleges abused her.
When Russell and Becky Porter go missing, authorities are concerned when their house smells of bleach. The investigation leads to an uncle who hated the couple.
A father dreams his daughter has been killed, then she disappears - what does her boyfriend know, and could the dad's nightmare have been an omen?
The bodies of two women are found in the ashes of a deliberate apartment fire. Evidence found in the debris leads investigators to their suspect.
Two men telephoned 911 to report a woman murdered; neither knew the other had called. The victim's ex-husband was a gun collector, so police had three viable suspects.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. A camping trip turns nightmarish when Alex is kidnapped by deranged brothers.
Action thriller with Jean-Claude Van Damme. A French detective makes his way through New York's underworld to hunt down the Russian mobsters who ordered the murder of his twin brother.
High-speed reality series featuring actual footage of officers in hot pursuit of felons on the run. Interviews with suspects and police offer a unique insight into why they run.
